name: cpig-r4-demo
description: R4 demo — a multi-atom scene (sphere + gyroid lattice) with LIVE rep cycling through tape → atlasBaked → mesh → pointCloud → companionTape, so the operator can see the R4 rep-dispatch paths working. R4 moved the rep capability flags (canTape/canGrid/canPoint/canMesh) from the C# conduit mirror to the artifact (single source of truth). This test cycles the reps and captures at each stage — if R4 broke rep dispatch, the reps would be inert (all frames identical, the 0059 symptom). The camera setup mirrors the rep-matrix pattern (decoy-sphere framing + solo perspective).

setup.vlmDescription: A ray-marched SDF scene showing a sphere and a gyroid lattice, cycling through different rendering representations (solid tape, grid atlas, mesh shell, point cloud, companion stand-in). Each checkpoint should show a VISUALLY DISTINCT representation — NOT all identical frames.

checkpoints.name: cpig-r4-demo-auto
checkpoints.description: R4 demo — auto rep (fresh-field default): sphere + gyroid lattice in their native representations.
